issues.title: External Call To User-Supplied Address
issues.description: A call to a user-supplied address is executed. The callee can re-enter the caller before state is updated, enabling a classic reentrancy attack.
issues.longDescription: A call to a user-supplied address is executed. The callee can re-enter the caller before state is updated, enabling a classic reentrancy attack.

issues.title: State change after external call
issues.description: The contract changes state after sending Ether to an external address; this is reachable from withdraw().

issues.title: Dependence on tx.origin
issues.description: Use of tx.origin as an authorization check enables phishing attacks.
